ArtifactKind.description: The type of artifact being installed.

LayerGroup.description:
Controls how a package is grouped for deployment layers.

Build stages are always per-package (for cache efficiency).
This field controls deployment layer consolidation to avoid
btrfs hardlink limits in ostree.

oneOf.description:
Package gets its own deployment layer.
Use for high-churn, large packages (e.g., vscode, edge).

Package is grouped with other bundled packages.
Use for low-churn, smaller packages.

layer_group.description: Controls deployment layer grouping. Defaults to bundled.

source.description: How to discover the latest artifact

VendorResponseMap.description: Maps resolved artifact field names to vendor response JSON field names.

sha256.description: Vendor response field containing the SHA256 checksum

url.description: Vendor response field containing the download URL

vendor_revision.description: Vendor response field containing a revision identifier (optional)

version.description: Vendor response field containing the version string

VendorSource.description: Discovery specification for a vendor artifact.

oneOf.description: Vendor release feed with templated URL

platforms.description:
Architecture → platform identifier mapping.
The resolved platform value is available as `{platform}` in the URL template.

response_map.description: Maps resolved artifact field names to vendor response JSON field names.
